chunks.title: Call to God's Arising and Victory
chunks.reason: An opening invocation celebrating God's power over enemies and care for the vulnerable.

chunks.title: The March to Sinai and Ascension
chunks.reason: A narrative recounting God's historical march through the wilderness and His ascension.

chunks.title: God as Daily Burden-Bearer
chunks.reason: A declaration of God's daily help and a specific oracle regarding the defeat of enemies.

chunks.title: The Procession to the Sanctuary
chunks.reason: A vivid description of a royal procession entering the sanctuary followed by a call for strength.

chunks.title: Call to Praise from All Nations
chunks.reason: A concluding summons for the kingdoms of the earth to sing praises to God's majesty.
